Bash(node -e " const d = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => d.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const routes = JSON.parse\(Buffer.concat\(d\)\); console.log\('Routes returned:', routes.length\); const r = routes.find\(r => r.Id === 'BCT109_North'\); console.log\('BCT109_North found:', !!r\); console.log\('Has Shp:', !!r?.Shp\); console.log\('Color:', r?.Color\); }\); " echo "")
